channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Mbappe becomes first player to win World Cup Golden Boot twice

item.description:
Kylian Mbappe becomes the first player to win the FIFA World Cup Golden Boot twice, leading the 2026 tournament with 10 goals. Read more about his historic

item.title: Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Spain won their second World Cup title after Ferran Torres' 106th-minute smashed finish earned a 1-0 win against defending champions Argentina in the 2026 final.

item.description: Ferran Torres scored the only goal of the game on Sunday as Spain beat 10-man Argentina 1-0 after extra-time to win their second World Cup. The European champions dominated the match at the MetLife Stadium but struggled to find a breakthrough against the streetwise defending champions. Argentina goa

item.title: Oil prices surge, stock futures flat as fighting between U.S. and Iran intensifies
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Oil prices rose while U.S stock-index futures were little changed on Sunday, amid an escalation of fighting in the Middle East and as investors await key tech earnings this week.

item.title: Man United Should Have Splashed £116m On Anderson –Robson
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Manchester United legend Bryan Robson has disclosed that while Manchester City overpaid for Elliot Anderson, his former club should have matched the massive £116 million bid to secure the midfielder. In a chat with Hajper, Robson believes the Red Devils needed to meet the valuation to make a true st

item.title: Nigeria pushes ECOWAS compact, condemns South Africa attacks on Africans
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Nigeria has reaffirmed its commitment to deepening regional integration, democratic governance and collective security in West Africa, while The post Nigeria pushes ECOWAS compact, condemns South Africa attacks on Africans appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: SERAP Vows To Sue NASS Over Bill Empowering NDPC To Regulate Social Media
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Socio-Economic Rights and Accountability Project (SERAP) has threatened to drag the National Assembly to court over a proposed amendment to the Nigeria Data Protection Act, which it alleges could indirectly empower the government to shut down social media platforms in Nigeria. SERAP, which made

item.title: E-Invoicing: NRS Sets July 31 Deadline For Large Taxpayers, Warns Defaulters
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: It warned that any defaulting member may be subjected to appropriate regulatory and enforcement actions in accordance with the provisions of the relevant tax laws and regulations. item.title: Burna Boy, Shakira, BTS, Others Wow Fans At Historic FIFA World Cup Final Halftime Show
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The show marked FIFA's first-ever Super Bowl-style halftime performance during the World Cup final between defending champions Argentina and Spain at MetLife Stadium. item.title: Senegal’s president elected new ECOWAS chairman
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The President of Senegal has been elected as the new Chairman of the ECOWAS Authority of Heads of State and The post Senegal’s president elected new ECOWAS chairman appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Tragedy hits Ooni’s family as elder brother dies suddenly
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Born on December 8, 1967, Prince Adetunji hailed from the illustrious Ojaja lineage of the Giesi Ruling House in Ile-Ife. He was the Group Chairman of Primewaterview Holdings and was widely respected in Nigeria's business community for his visionary leadership and entrepreneurial accomplishments.

item.title: NPFL: Plateau United snap up former home-Eagles midfielder
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Plateau United have completed the signing of experienced midfielder Dayo Ojo, DAILY POST reports. Ojo joined Plateau United on a free transfer after leaving from Beninoise side ASVO FC. The experience midfielder penned one- year deal with the Peace Boys. Ojo is expected to play a crucial role in Gbe

item.title: Kano fire service saves man trapped after wall collapse in Kano
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A man was rescued alive by the Kano State Fire Service after a wall collapse during a demolition exercise in Kano. Authorities urge safety precautions.
Read More: https://punchng.com/kano-fire-service-saves-man-trapped-after-wall-collapse-in-kano/

item.title: Edo Govt To Investigate Ownership Of Property Linked To Late Ambrose Alli
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Edo State Government has commenced an investigation into the ownership of a property believed to be linked to the late former Governor of the defunct Bendel State, Professor Ambrose Alli. The property, located along Uwasota Road in Egor Local Government Area, is currently occupied by a private s
